prestazioni: LS3 (6.2L V8) engine: Full forged internals by Manley (forged crankshaft, H-beam connecting rods, and forged pistons) with a 12.5:1 compression ratio, paired with a Harrop HTV2300 supercharger (12psi boost) and a custom intercooler setup by PWR (Australia) for sustained power delivery. Supporting mods include a Holley Dominator EFI system with custom LS3-specific tuning by Dyno Dynamics (Australia) for 650+ hp at the wheels.

Drivetrain: Upgraded Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission with a twin-disc clutch by Spec Clutch (Stage 3+), paired with a Harrop diff cover and a 3.91:1 ratio LSD from Strange Engineering for improved torque transfer. Custom driveshaft by Driveshaft Shop (3.5-inch chromoly) to handle increased power.

Suspension & Braking: Full Ohlins TTX40 coilover kit (VXR8-specific valving) with adjustable camber plates by SuperPro, paired with poly bushings throughout (subframe, control arms, and sway bars). Braking upgraded to AP Racing CP9660 6-piston front calipers with 400mm two-piece rotors (slotted and dimpled) and Ferodo DS3000 pads, with a custom brake bias controller by Tilton Engineering.
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody kit by ADR Motorsport (Australia), including front splitter, side skirts, rear diffuser, and a custom GT-style rear wing (adjustable angle). Carbon fiber hood with functional heat extractors by Seibon Carbon. Front bumper modified with a custom mesh grille by VXR Performance (UK) for improved airflow to the intercooler.

Wheels & Tires: Custom 20x10.5 ET15 (front) and 20x12 ET40 (rear) forged wheels by Rotiform (LAS-R model, matte black finish), wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 315/30/20 rear). Custom wheel spacers by H&R (15mm front, 25mm rear) for aggressive stance.

Interior: Full Alcantara-wrapped interior by Cobra Seats (UK), including Recaro SPG XL seats (VXR8-specific mounting brackets), a custom roll cage by Custom Cages (UK) with integrated harness bar, and a Motec C127 dash display replacing the stock cluster. Pedal set by Sparco (aluminum with rubber inserts) and a custom quick-release steering wheel by NRG Innovations (350mm, suede).
